name: inevitable
description: Mike Colias' deep-dive on the EV transition — legacy incumbent transformation, charging infrastructure, battery cost barriers, and the China threat.
useCase: Navigating industry disruption, breaking chicken-and-egg deadlocks, competing with state-backed rivals, driving down component costs, leading through messy transitions.
knownRisks: The EV industry is evolving rapidly — some data may already be dated
Colias is a WSJ reporter writing narrative journalism, not a consultant offering frameworks
The automotive context may not translate directly to other industries
